name: synaptix-website
description: Synaptix — AI-powered Level II home sleep diagnostics website

scripts.build: npm run build:clean && npm run build:html && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:config && npm run build:assets
scripts.build:clean: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist dist/assets/css dist/assets/js dist/assets/images
scripts.build:html: for f in src/*.html; do sed 's|\.\./||g' "$f" > "dist/$(basename "$f")"; done
scripts.build:assets: cp -r assets/images/* dist/assets/images/ 2>/dev/null || :; cp assets/favicon.svg dist/assets/; cp assets/favicon.svg dist/
scripts.optimize: npm run optimize:css && npm run optimize:js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run optimize

author: Synaptix
